notes:
## What's new

- Send to someone who's offline? Your file now waits safely on your own computer and goes straight to them the moment they come back online — it never sits on a server in between.
- New "Waiting to send" list shows anything lined up for friends who are offline. Changed your mind? Cancel it with one tap.
- Added a "Send to Phone" button — sending to your phone is coming soon!
- Made updates more reliable so VORP can keep itself up to date without hiccups.
